'''Peirs''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TDC" /> within the [[Peirs system/Legends|Peirs system]]<ref name="DarkStryder note" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]'<ref name="Atlas" /> [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]].<ref name="TDC" /> Connected to the neighboring planets of [[Gandle Ott]], [[Shintel]] and [[Ivatch]] by [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], Peirs supported a small colony whose economy was based around supplying [[Ore/Legends|ore]] and natural resources to Gandle Ott.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Peirs was featured in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] by [[West End Games]]. Peirs was not featured directly in any adventure, but was included to give background information on worlds within the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="TDC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Peirs system, and therefore the planet Peirs, in grid square M-21.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
